Experiments I’ve designed and worked with at NTHU

The experiments related to these designs can be found in the following papers

  • Crumpling-origami transition for twisting cylindrical shells

  • Phase Diagram and Snap-Off Transition for a Twisted Party Balloon

  • Crumpling an elastoplastic thin sphere

  • Crumpling-origami transition for twisting cylindrical shells
